title: Add chat-derived memory models and atomic file storage
objective: Create the persistent metadata and runtime file writer for personal and organization chat knowledge.
requirements: Add MemoryWriteRequest, MemoryKnowledgeItem, MemoryKnowledgeCandidate, MemoryReflectionRun, SecretHandle and SecretAccessAudit or equivalent split models.
Add atomic writer for data/memory/chat_knowledge/users/<user_id>/ and data/memory/chat_knowledge/org/default/.
Use append-only events and rebuild current projections.
Store source ChatMessage provenance by ids and hashes, not unbounded copied raw chat text.
acceptance_checks: Personal and organization scopes do not share files.
